### [OthmanAdi](https://github.com/OthmanAdi) /  [planning-with-files](https://github.com/OthmanAdi/planning-with-files)

[Sponsor](https://github.com/sponsors/OthmanAdi)

[Star\\
23k](https://github.com/login?return_to=%2FOthmanAdi%2Fplanning-with-files)

- [Code](https://github.com/OthmanAdi/planning-with-files)
- [Issues](https://github.com/OthmanAdi/planning-with-files/issues)
- [Pull requests](https://github.com/OthmanAdi/planning-with-files/pulls)
- [Discussions](https://github.com/OthmanAdi/planning-with-files/discussions)

Persistent file-based planning for long-running agentic tasks. Crash-proof markdown plans, deterministic completion gate, multi-agent shared state on disk. Works with Claude Code, Codex CLI, Cursor, Hermes agent, Pi, Kiro, OpenCode and 60+ agents via the SKILL.md standard.
